stories.title: Alcaraz Withdraws from Barcelona — Right Wrist Injury, French Open Fears

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Alcaraz is out of Barcelona. Right wrist injury — tests showed it's "slightly more serious than expected."

He came to Spain to win No. 1 back. Now he's watching from the sideline.

#BarcelonaOpen #Tennis

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Alcaraz on his Barcelona withdrawal: "After a return, my wrist gave way."

Machac gets a walkover to the QF. French Open is 6 weeks away.

"I hope you'll see me back on court very soon." — Alcaraz

#ATP #Tennis

article.headline: Alcaraz Withdraws from Barcelona with Wrist Injury, French Open Fears Grow

stories.title: Munich QF Set — Fonseca vs. Shelton Showdown; First Brazilian in Munich QF in 12 Years

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Fonseca def. Rinderknech 6-3, 6-2 in Munich. Second win over the Frenchman in 8 days.

First Brazilian in the Munich QF in 12 years.

Fonseca vs. Shelton. Clay court showdown. #BMWOpen #Tennis

article.headline: Fonseca vs. Shelton: Munich QF Set After Brazilian Earns Historic Milestone

stories.title: Swiatek Opens Clay Season with Stuttgart Win — Roig Partnership Begins

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Swiatek def. Siegemund 6-2, 6-3. First clay match of 2026. First match with new coach Francisco Roig.

She's through to the Stuttgart QF. The Roig era begins. #WTAStuttgart

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
New coach. Same result.

Swiatek opened her clay season at Stuttgart with a 6-2, 6-3 win — broke Siegemund 5 times, won 78% of first serves.

She's a 2-time champion here. #WTAStuttgart #Tennis

article.headline: Swiatek Opens Clay Season at Stuttgart: First Win with Coach Roig, QF Ahead

stories.title: Barcelona R16 Day — Machac Eyes QF, Rublev and Fils in Action

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Barcelona R16 without Alcaraz:

Machac — walkover to QF.
Rublev vs. Sonego.
Musetti vs. Moutet.
Fils vs. Nakashima.

The draw is wide open. Who comes out of the bottom half? #BarcelonaOpen

stories.title: Stuttgart QF Picture — Gauff Faces Samsonova, Rybakina in Action

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Gauff vs. Samsonova at Stuttgart today — Gauff's first clay match of 2026. She's 3-0 H2H.

Swiatek already through. Rybakina looming.

Stuttgart's QF lineup is taking shape. #WTAStuttgart #Tennis

article.headline: Stuttgart QF Picture Takes Shape: Gauff Opens Clay Season, Rybakina and Swiatek Lurk
